summary: Iteration 170: Complete removal of email verification functionality verified. All 13 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Registration and login flows work without verification, both redirect to /profile.

features_tested: POST /api/auth/login works with NO verification check - PASS
POST /api/auth/login response has no email_verified field - PASS
POST /api/auth/register has NO email_verified field in response - PASS
Registration redirects to /profile (not /feed or verification screen) - PASS (UI)
Login page has NO 'Resend Verification Email' button - PASS (UI)
Register page has NO verification confirmation screen - PASS (UI)
App.js has NO VerifyEmail import - VERIFIED (no imports found)
App.js has NO EmailVerificationPending import - VERIFIED (no imports found)
App.js has NO /verify-email route - VERIFIED (not in routes)

critical_code_review_comments: All email verification endpoints removed from backend (verify-email, resend-verification, resend-verification-public all return 404)
Registration returns token immediately for auto-login, no verification required
Login has no verification check, works for existing users
Login.jsx has no showResendVerification, resendingVerification, handleResendVerification code
Register.jsx has no registrationComplete, registeredEmail, verification screen code
Both login and registration redirect to /profile as expected
App.js has no VerifyEmail or EmailVerificationPending imports
Dead files (VerifyEmail.jsx, EmailVerificationPending.jsx) exist on disk but are NOT imported anywhere
seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests with random emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email verification completely removed. Registration creates user → auto-login → redirect to /profile. Login: email+password → redirect to /profile. No verification checks, no verification emails, no verify endpoints, no resend buttons. Dead files (VerifyEmail.jsx, EmailVerificationPending.jsx) exist on disk but are NOT imported or used anywhere.
